question: Where exactly do you feel the pain or discomfort?
When did this problem first start?
What does the sensation feel like — burning, aching, pressing, sharp?
Has anything happened in your life around the time this problem started?
What makes it worse?
What gives you relief?
Does it come at any particular time of day?
Is it constant or does it come and go?
Does weather or temperature affect it?
How has your sleep been lately?
Which side do you prefer to sleep on?
Do you feel hot or cold more often than others?
How is your appetite?
Are there any foods you crave strongly?
Are there any foods you cannot tolerate?
How much water do you drink in a day — are you usually thirsty?
How is your digestion — any issues with bloating, acidity, or bowels?
Do you sweat a lot? If so, where on the body?
How would you describe your mood lately?
Do you have any fears — heights, dark, crowds, being alone, death?
How do you handle stress or emotional pressure?
Do you prefer company or being alone?
Have you experienced any grief, loss, or shock recently?
How is your memory and concentration?
Have you had any significant illness in the past?
Any surgeries or major injuries in the past?
Have you taken any long-term medications?
Does anyone in your family have a similar complaint?
Are there any hereditary conditions in your family like diabetes, heart disease, or cancer?
What is your occupation and daily routine like?
